core.sustainability.utils.grid_factors module

GRID FACTORS – Load grid intensity data

Author: Deepak Panigrahy

class core.sustainability.utils.grid_factors.GridFactorManager(config_loader)[source]

Bases: object

Manages grid intensity factors by reading from config file.

WORLD_AVERAGES = {'carbon': 0.475, 'methane': 0.18, 'water': 2.0}
get_factors(country_code: str = 'US') → GridFactors[source]

Get grid factors for a country.

list_countries() → list[source]

Get list of available countries.

class core.sustainability.utils.grid_factors.GridFactors(country_code: str, carbon_kg_per_kwh: float, water_l_per_kwh: float, methane_g_per_kwh: float, data_quality: str = 'medium', sources: Dict = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Grid factors for a country.

country_code: str
